input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.12.6.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.12.6.4
            TITLE: the vehicle must exit the track into the driver change area

            CONTENT:
            rule D.12.6.4: The vehicle must exit the track into the Driver Change Area
D.12.6.4 The vehicle must exit the track into the Driver Change Area

final_answer: The vehicle must exit the track into the Driver Change Area
